questions.assertion: Assertion (A): The axon of a neuron is a long, thin extension of the cell.
questions.reason: Reason (R): It is responsible for transmitting signals to other neurons.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: This option is correct because the axon of a neuron is indeed a long, thin extension of the cell and it is responsible for transmitting signals to other neurons.

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): The dendrites of a neuron receive signals from other neurons.
questions.reason: Reason (R): These signals are then transmitted to the cell body for processing.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: This option is correct because the dendrites of a neuron do receive signals from other neurons and these signals are then transmitted to the cell body for processing.

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): The synapse is a small gap between two neurons.
questions.reason: Reason (R): It is the site of chemical transmission of nerve impulses.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: This option is correct because the synapse is indeed a small gap between two neurons and it is the site of chemical transmission of nerve impulses.

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): The myelin sheath is a fatty, insulating layer around the axon.

(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: This option is correct because the myelin sheath is indeed a fatty, insulating layer around the axon and it speeds up the transmission of nerve impulses.

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): The peripheral nervous system (PNS) includes the sensory receptors.

(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): The autonomic nervous system (ANS) controls voluntary movements.
